contentPattern.structure: 1 featured person (portrait + pull-quote + name + title + bio link) followed by ~20 people cards (portrait + name + title + bio link), horizontally scrollable
contentPattern.perRow: image cell + content cell (name, title, optional quote), optionally wrapped in a bio link

suitableFor: horizontally-scrolling grids of people cards (photo + name + title) linking to bio pages
team or staff directories with an optional featured/lead person and pull-quote
notSuitableFor: full-bleed image carousels with text overlay (use carousel-capabilities)
